headline: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) is a Trending Stock
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: How to Play Defense in This Market: Embrace Utilities
summary: Utilities are historically considered defensive stocks.  Few sectors appear more war-proof than utilities, whose assets are contained in the U.S., protected by state regulation and provide an essential service.  Utilities are down 4% since the start of the conflict, outperforming the broader index by 3.5 percentage points.
